items.title: Amazon RDS & Aurora
items.description: Amazon RDS and Aurora for DVA-C02. Multi-AZ vs Read Replicas, Aurora Serverless, RDS Proxy, IAM authentication, connection pooling, encryption, and common developer patterns with Java/Spring Boot.

items.title: Scaling Reads
items.description: Strategies for handling high read QPS including caching layers, read replicas, CDN, CQRS, and database indexing. Covers Redis patterns, cache invalidation, and fan-out strategies.
